tasks.title: Implement shared MC backlog (mc-backlog.json)
tasks.description: Server reads from both dispatch.json (local, gitignored) and mc-backlog.json (tracked). Dispatch page merges both, shows which pool each task belongs to. Creating/editing a task lets you pick local vs MC.

tasks.title: Fix 'needs input' detection for CLI prompts
tasks.description: Agent cards don't always detect when Claude CLI is waiting for user input. The Stop hook fires but sometimes the state shows as IDLE instead of NEEDS INPUT. Investigate hook timing and AskUserQuestion detection.

tasks.title: Set up home PC git flow (fredowill auth + pull)
tasks.description: Clone or pull agent-mission-control on home PC, install hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json, set up .env with Cerebras key, verify toolbox renders with home machine's agents.

tasks.title: Prompts after skill/tool expansion show raw markdown instead of collapsed summary
tasks.description: Session detail page still shows full tool call markdown in prompt cards instead of a short 'tool was invoked' summary. The detectSkill() heuristic in prompt-hook.js misses some patterns. Prompt text after a skill expansion may also be lost entirely.

tasks.title: Build availability-over-time query from CARES dashboard exception query
Redesign CARES Guide � overhaul information architecture and presentation
tasks.description: Rethink how information is structured and presented in the CARES Guide app. Current sections have grown organically and need a cohesive redesign � better hierarchy, clearer navigation, improved content flow. Evaluate what is essential vs cluttered, and make the guide easier to consume for new team members and daily reference.

tasks.title: Redesign Dispatch page UI
tasks.description: Visual and UX overhaul of the Mission Control Dispatch page (dispatch-page.html). Improve layout, card design, filtering experience, and overall polish. Make it more scannable and pleasant to use as a daily work queue.

tasks.title: Allow bypass permissions in Claude Code with adequate guardrails
tasks.description: Set up Claude Code permission config to allow auto-accepting certain tool calls without manual approval on every invocation. Needs proper guardrails first � define which tools are safe to auto-approve (e.g. Read, Grep, Glob), which always require confirmation (e.g. Bash with destructive commands, Write to sensitive paths), and document the risk model. Configure allowedTools in ~/.claude/settings.json accordingly.

tasks.title: Fix user prompt detection � capture all prompt types on dashboard
tasks.description: Currently only one type of user prompt is detected and shown on the Mission Control dashboard. Simple permission prompts (e.g. tool approval dialogs) do not get captured by prompt-hook.js, so the agent card does not reflect that the session is waiting for input. Need to investigate all prompt types Claude CLI can emit (tool permission, AskUserQuestion, plan approval, etc.) and ensure prompt-hook.js captures them all so the dashboard accurately shows when any session needs user input.
